title: Verify existing implementation of deepMerge utility
description: The deepMerge<T>(target: T, source: Partial<T>): T function has already been implemented in src/utils/object-helpers.ts with 25 passing tests covering primitives, plain objects, arrays, Date/RegExp/Map/Set handling, null/undefined values, and deep nesting. Implementation uses isPlainObject helper and cloneSpecialObject for special types, with recursive merge for nested objects and array replacement behavior.
existing_patterns: src/utils/object-helpers.ts: isPlainObject type guard pattern for checking plain objects
src/utils/object-helpers.ts: cloneSpecialObject pattern for handling Date/RegExp/Map/Set as atomic values
src/utils/*.test.ts: co-located test file pattern with vitest describe/it/expect
